properties.Test Case: Make a fresh derivative of "A Family Learns about Immunisations" in an English collection. Try various page sizes and layouts with and without page numbers turned on. Verify against the screenshot results here. (Note: screenshots have images fit-to-size and layout adjusted to landscape or portrait as needed.) Nov 2025 testing note: it looks like some padding settings have changed slightly since the original screenshots were taken. So, conformity to the screenshots is no longer part of this test.
